Home > Working at DLC
Join Our Team

Check out the positions available at Deer Lodge Centre on the WRHA Careers Website!

As the province’s largest Rehabilitation and Long Term Care facility, Deer Lodge Centre provides many opportunities for challenging experiences and career growth. Conveniently located on Portage Avenue, only a short walk from Assiniboine Park, DLC inpatient and outpatient programming includes Rehabilitation, Respiratory, Mental Health, Chronic and Personal Care. As well, we maintain a proud over 100-year tradition of serving Veterans and the military through inpatient and outpatient programs including our Operational Stress Injury Clinic. As an operating division of the Winnipeg Regional Health Authority, Deer Lodge Centre serves as a centre of excellence in rehabilitation and long term care for the region and provides many regional support services.

The Centre’s motto of “Making Lives Better” applies to the staff as well as the patients and residents. Broad educational offerings, an active Wellness Committee and on-site fitness facility, and access to research are just some of what we offer to support staff in their career and personal lives.
